one_time_description: Indigenous Services Canada prior year reimbursements recognized in 2021
economic_notes: Nation operates business enterprises including Petrokas Ltd., Kasabonika Community Development Corporation, Wechimachida Construction Services and Wechimachida Construction Limited Partnership. Government business partnerships include Asabanaka Drill Services and Wechimachida-Penn-Co. Participates in Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership and Ontario First Nations Sovereign Wealth Limited Partnership.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - auditors unable to verify occurrence of other revenue due to insufficient documentation. Fiscal year 2021 statements were signed February 9, 2023 - nearly 2 years late, indicating significant reporting delays. First Nation was not in compliance with loan covenants regarding timely submission of audited financial statements. Large deferred revenue drawdown of $23.26M from prior year (mainly New School construction project) inflated 2021 revenue significantly. Loss on investments in government business partnerships of $922,942 recognized. Capital lease obligations of $224,810 not included in long_term_debt figure. Annual debt service reflects long-term debt repayments only; capital lease repayments of $160,476 also made. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC ($32,190,230), Government of Ontario ($5,010,579), CMHC ($511,278), and SLFNHA ($368,607) transfers.
